(1) These Bye-laws may be called the Coir Board Employees (Conduct) (Amendment) Bye-law5, 2001. (2) They shall come into force on the date of their publication in the Official Gazette. · 2. In the Coir Board Employees (Conduct) Bye-laws, 1968 after bye-law 22, the following bye-law shall be inserted, namely:- · ''22-A Prohibition regarding employment of Children below 14 years of age : No employee shall employ any child below the age of 14 years." · [F. No. 6(3)/200l.:C0ir] S~AGGARWAL, Jt. Secy. FOOT NOTE :-Thenotificationforconstitutionofthe CoirBoard was issued vide number S.O. 784 (E) dated the 7th September, 1998and subsequently amended vide numbers (1) S.O. 38(E)datedthe28thJanuary, 1999, (2) S.O. l66(E) dated. the lith March, 1999, (3) S.O. 410 (E) dated the 26th April, 2000 and(4) S.O. 70 (E) dated the 19th January, 2001.
